sections_in_order: E. Explain System State (deterministic) — only when graph supplies a root cause

abuse_cases.case: operator answers 'what is broken / what to fix first / can I trust this' in 10 seconds
abuse_cases.evaluation: Trust Pulse provides 'can I trust this'; Top 3 cards provide 'what to fix first'; Trust Pulse warning_count + Explain panel provide 'what is broken'. Overview is 4–5 panels max; mobile p-3 padding ensures readability.
topThree.warning still surfaces with red text and the recompute_command remains visible. Stale state surfaces 'Top 3 stale — regenerate priority artifact.' with the exact command.
Queue is built from roadmap.safe_bundles (TLS roadmap), not from the priority artifact. Top 3 (priority) and Queue (roadmap) are clearly distinct surfaces.

Overview shows up to 3 items from queue_1_immediate_next_bundle only. Full 4-queue view is on the Roadmap tab inside roadmap-full-queues. TLS-BND-* labels never become graph nodes because registryContract.allowed_active_node_ids excludes them.
